@elizaos/app-2004scape.description: 2004scape game service — autonomous RS agent with SDK WebSocket layer

@elizaos/app-babylon.description: Eliza app integration for Babylon prediction market game.

@elizaos/app-clawville.description: Eliza app integration for ClawVille, a sea-themed agent game where connected agents enter a 3D underwater world, visit specialist buildings, and learn skills via the agentskills.io open standard.

@elizaos/app-companion.description: Companion app package with the VRM scene runtime and avatar utilities.

@elizaos/app-contacts.description: Android Contacts overlay app — wraps the @elizaos/capacitor-contacts native plugin.

@elizaos/app-defense-of-the-agents.description: Eliza app integration for Defense of the Agents.

@elizaos/app-documents.description: Character Knowledge documents, fragments, and search routes for the agent.

@elizaos/app-elizamaker.description: ElizaMaker: ERC-8041 NFT drop/mint/whitelist routes, Twitter-verified Merkle proofs, and OG code tracking.

@elizaos/app-hyperliquid.description: Native Hyperliquid market, position, and order status for wallet trading.

@elizaos/app-hyperscape.description: Hyperscape game session resolvers — spectate-and-steer agent sessions with live data from the Hyperscape API

@elizaos/app-lifeops.description: LifeOps app plugin: routines, goals, Google Workspace, Apple Calendar, Apple Reminders, Twilio, browser companion control, hosts-file blocking (self-control), and related agent surfaces.

@elizaos/app-phone.description: Phone app for Eliza — Android dialer/call-log overlay (@elizaos/capacitor-phone) and the iOS Phone Companion (pairing, chat-mirror, remote-session).

@elizaos/app-polymarket.description: Native Polymarket market discovery and trading readiness for prediction markets.

@elizaos/app-scape.description: 'scape — first-class agent integration for xRSPS. Autonomous RuneScape-alike agent with JSON-encoded state, Scape Journal, and directed-prompt operator control.

@elizaos/app-screenshare.description: Screen Share app: authenticated desktop screen streaming and remote mouse/keyboard control for local, Linux, macOS, and Windows runtimes.

@elizaos/app-shopify.description: Storefront and admin tools for agent-driven commerce.

@elizaos/app-steward.description: Wallet management, browser wallet bridge, and trade approval routes.

@elizaos/app-training.description: Training jobs, datasets, models, blueprints, and trajectory routes for the agent.

@elizaos/app-trajectory-logger.description: Realtime trajectory inspector overlay app — surfaces the last completed and the in-flight trajectory with HANDLE / PLAN / ACTION / EVALUATE phase drilldowns.

@elizaos/app-vincent.description: Connect Vincent to trade on Hyperliquid and Polymarket through Vincent's agent.

@elizaos/app-wifi.description: Wi-Fi overlay app for the Eliza Android build — scan, inspect, and connect to nearby networks via @elizaos/capacitor-wifi.

@elizaos/plugin-agent-orchestrator.description: Canonical ElizaOS plugin for spawning and orchestrating coding agents via the Agent Client Protocol (acpx) — combined with workspace lifecycle, GitHub integration, task share, runtime-driven sub-agent routing, and supporting services.

@elizaos/plugin-agent-skills.description: Agent Skills plugin for elizaOS - implement the Agent Skills specification with progressive disclosure

@elizaos/plugin-anthropic.description: Anthropic model provider for Claude chat and reasoning models.

@elizaos/plugin-aosp-local-inference.description: AOSP-only llama.cpp FFI bindings (via bun:ffi) and local-inference bootstrap for elizaOS mobile builds.

@elizaos/plugin-app-control.description: App control plugin for Eliza agents — launch, close, and list running apps via the local dashboard API.

@elizaos/plugin-background-runner.description: Background task runner for elizaOS — drives core TaskService.runDueTasks() from OS-level wake-ups (BGTaskScheduler on iOS, WorkManager on Android via @capacitor/background-runner). Falls back to a setInterval poll when no native scheduler is available.

@elizaos/plugin-bluebubbles.description: BlueBubbles connector for sending and receiving iMessage through a local BlueBubbles server.

@elizaos/plugin-browser.description: Browser plugin: unified BROWSER action and MANAGE_BROWSER_BRIDGE management action. Owns the workspace browser (electrobun-embedded + jsdom fallback) and the Chrome/Safari companion bridge. Targets are registered with the BrowserService; the agent uses what is available.

@elizaos/plugin-calendly.description: Calendly integration plugin for elizaOS agents — event types, scheduled events, cancellations, and booking-link handoff via Calendly v2 API

@elizaos/plugin-capacitor-bridge.description: Capacitor WebSocket bridge to device llama for stock mobile (non-AOSP) Eliza builds.

@elizaos/plugin-cli.description: CLI framework plugin for ElizaOS agents - provides command registration, execution, and utilities

@elizaos/plugin-coding-tools.description: Native Claude-Code-style coding tools (Read, Write, Edit, Bash, Grep, Glob, etc.) for the Eliza agent.

@elizaos/plugin-commands.description: Chat command system for Eliza agents (/help, /status, /reset, etc.)

@elizaos/plugin-computeruse.description: Desktop automation plugin — screenshots, mouse/keyboard control, browser CDP, and window management for elizaOS agents. Ported from open-computer-use (Apache 2.0).

@elizaos/plugin-discord.description: Discord connector for elizaOS servers, voice, and message management with Eliza Cloud OAuth gateway or local bot-token setup.

@elizaos/plugin-discord-local.description: Local Discord desktop integration for Eliza via Discord RPC and macOS UI automation

@elizaos/plugin-edge-tts.description: Free text-to-speech using Microsoft Edge TTS - no API key required

@elizaos/plugin-elevenlabs.description: ElevenLabs voice plugin for text-to-speech generation and conversational audio output.

@elizaos/plugin-eliza-classic.description: Deterministic ELIZA-style pattern matching (browser + Node); ships compiled ESM in dist/.

@elizaos/plugin-elizacloud.description: elizaOS plugin to connect with elizaOS Cloud services

@elizaos/plugin-farcaster.description: Farcaster connector for publishing casts and responding to social conversations.

@elizaos/plugin-feishu.description: Feishu connector for bots, chats, and workflow notifications on Lark/Feishu.

@elizaos/plugin-form.description: Eliza plugin-form: conversational forms as guardrails for guided user journeys.

@elizaos/plugin-github.description: GitHub integration plugin for elizaOS agents — PRs, issues, notifications via the GitHub REST API

@elizaos/plugin-google-chat.description: Google Chat connector for bots, spaces, and message-driven workflows.

@elizaos/plugin-google-genai.description: LLM ElizaOS plugin for google genai

@elizaos/plugin-groq.description: Groq model provider for low-latency chat and inference workloads.

@elizaos/plugin-health.description: Health, sleep, circadian and screen-time domain plugin for elizaOS — extracted from app-lifeops in Wave 1 (W1-B). Owns connectors (Apple Health, Google Fit, Strava, Fitbit, Withings, Oura), sleep/circadian/regularity engines, screen-time aggregation, and the wake/bedtime/nap anchor contributions consumed by app-lifeops via the W1-F connector / channel / signal-bus contracts.

@elizaos/plugin-imessage.description: iMessage connector for Mac-based conversations and message automation.

@elizaos/plugin-inmemorydb.description: Pure in-memory, ephemeral database storage for elizaOS - no persistence, completely forgets on reset

@elizaos/plugin-instagram.description: Enables Instagram integration with support for media posting, comment handling, and interaction management.

@elizaos/plugin-line.description: LINE connector for bot messaging and customer conversations.

@elizaos/plugin-local-ai.description: LocalAI provider for self-hosted, OpenAI-compatible local model inference.

@elizaos/plugin-local-embedding.description: Local AI model embedding and inference plugin for ElizaOS

@elizaos/plugin-local-inference.description: Local inference HTTP routes for the Eliza agent: model catalog, downloads, hardware detection, and chat-command surface.

@elizaos/plugin-local-storage.description: Local filesystem attachment storage backed by @brighter/storage-adapter-local. Default fallback when Eliza Cloud storage is not connected.

@elizaos/plugin-localdb.description: File-backed (Node) and localStorage (browser) persistence via plugin-inmemorydb; ships compiled ESM in dist/.

@elizaos/plugin-matrix.description: Matrix connector for rooms, bots, and federated chat workflows.

@elizaos/plugin-mcp.description: elizaOS plugin to integrate with MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers

@elizaos/plugin-minecraft.description: Minecraft automation plugin for ElizaOS (Mineflayer bridge)

@elizaos/plugin-music.description: Unified music plugin: library & playlists, metadata APIs, playback engine, queue, HTTP streaming routes, and optional Discord voice.

@elizaos/plugin-mysticism.description: Mystical divination engines for ElizaOS — Tarot, I Ching, and Astrology readings

@elizaos/plugin-ngrok.description: Ngrok tunnel plugin for elizaOS — third-party backend implementing the @elizaos/plugin-tunnel ITunnelService contract.

@elizaos/plugin-nostr.description: Nostr connector for relay-based social posting and conversation handling.

@elizaos/plugin-ollama.description: Ollama provider for running local LLMs on your own machine.

@elizaos/plugin-openai.description: Integrates OpenAI's GPT models for automated text generation with customizable prompts.

@elizaos/plugin-openrouter.description: OpenRouter provider for routing requests across many hosted models through one API.

@elizaos/plugin-pdf.description: Core Node.js plugin for elizaOS that provides essential services and actions for file operations.

@elizaos/plugin-rlm.description: RLM (Recursive Language Model) plugin for elizaOS - enables processing of arbitrarily long contexts

@elizaos/plugin-roblox.description: Roblox app integration for agent-driven gameplay and interactive experiences.

@elizaos/plugin-shell.description: Shell history and observability plugin for ElizaOS

@elizaos/plugin-shopify.description: Shopify Admin API plugin for elizaOS agents -- manage products, orders, inventory, and customers.

@elizaos/plugin-signal.description: Signal messaging integration plugin for ElizaOS agents

@elizaos/plugin-slack.description: Slack integration plugin for elizaOS agents with Socket Mode support

@elizaos/plugin-social-alpha.description: Social Alpha Plugin — Tracks token recommendations (shills/FUD), builds trust scores based on P&L outcomes, and exposes a Social Alpha Provider with win rate, rank, and recommender analytics.

@elizaos/plugin-streaming.description: Unified RTMP streaming for elizaOS (Twitch, YouTube, X, pump.fun, custom and named ingest URLs)

@elizaos/plugin-suno.description: Suno AI Music Generation Plugin for Eliza

@elizaos/plugin-tailscale.description: Tunnel plugin for elizaOS — local Tailscale serve/funnel or Eliza Cloud-routed Tailscale auth-key minter

@elizaos/plugin-tee.description: Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) integration plugin for elizaOS - Multi-language support (TypeScript, Python, Rust)

@elizaos/plugin-telegram.description: Telegram connector for bot chats, groups, channels, and topic-based conversations through BotFather tokens or an Eliza Cloud webhook gateway.

@elizaos/plugin-todos.description: User-scoped persistent todos with CRUD. Single TODO umbrella action (op-based: write/create/update/complete/cancel/delete/list/clear) and a currentTodosProvider that surfaces the user's pending + in-progress todos to the planner each turn. Backed by drizzle pgSchema('todos').

@elizaos/plugin-tunnel.description: Tunnel plugin for elizaOS — local Tailscale CLI backend (serve/funnel). Pair with @elizaos/plugin-elizacloud for the hosted headscale backend.

@elizaos/plugin-twitch.description: Twitch connector for live chat, channel events, and audience interactions.

@elizaos/plugin-video.description: Video download, audio extraction, and transcription helpers (YouTube, Vimeo, direct MP4).

@elizaos/plugin-vision.description: Vision plugin for ElizaOS - provides camera integration and visual awareness

@elizaos/plugin-wallet.description: Unified non-custodial wallet for elizaOS agents — EVM + Solana, ERC-6551 token-bound accounts, on-chain spend policies, x402 micropayments, CCTP bridge, Li.Fi swap routing, Jupiter routing, multi-DEX LP management (Raydium/Orca/Meteora on Solana, Uniswap/Aerodrome on EVM), Hyperliquid perps, Polymarket, Aave/Morpho lending, and Clanker token launches. Replaces plugin-evm + plugin-solana + plugin-raydium + plugin-orca + plugin-meteora + plugin-jupiter + plugin-lp-manager + plugin-clanker behind one canonical action+provider surface.

@elizaos/plugin-wechat.description: WeChat connector plugin for elizaOS via proxy API

@elizaos/plugin-whatsapp.description: WhatsApp plugin for ElizaOS (Cloud API + Baileys QR auth)

@elizaos/plugin-workflow.description: ElizaOS plugin for generating and running workflows in-process

@elizaos/plugin-x.description: elizaOS X (formerly Twitter) connector: posting, mentions, replies, DMs, and timeline interactions.

@elizaos/plugin-x402.description: x402 micropayment middleware for elizaOS plugin HTTP routes

@elizaos/plugin-xai.description: elizaOS xAI plugin: Grok models for text generation and embeddings.
